ValidationRule.description: Story information must be verified by the developer before moving to Dev In Progress
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Dev In Progress"), ISCHANGED(Status__c), Story_Info_Verified__c = FALSE )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Story information must be verified before starting development. Please complete the "Verify Story Info" Activity Task and tick the "Story Info Verified" checkbox first.
